data.name: Make Her Cum
data.detailed_description:
Make her Cum is an Adult toy-play Simulator where you will be able to use sex toys to bring a variety of ladies to orgasm.



The game has a multitude of toys already available for you to use on our sexy ladies.



High Definition models, animated and eager for you to make them cum like they never have before.



Right now, the game mechanics allow you to use dildos, hands, fingers, tongue, and anal beads.



At the moment we have translations for the following languages, but they are machine translations, so some phrases might be a bit off:
Spanish, Chinese Simplified, Korean, Japanese, German, French, Russian, Norwegian.



Start by undressing the ladies, changing their positions, and using the correct toys to make them all cum.



Dick girls, you asked? Hell yeah!!!

data.short_description: Make her Cum is an Adult toy-play Simulator where you will be able to use sex toys to bring a variety of ladies to orgasm.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1
  • 處理器: Intel I5 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 1050 or equivalent ( minimum GPU memory 2 GB )
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 處理器: Intel I5 or Higher
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 2060 or equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1
  • Processor: Intel I5 or equivalent
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX 1050 or equivalent ( minimum GPU memory 2 GB )
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 12 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • Processor: Intel I5 or Higher
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: RTX 2060 or equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 12 GB available space
